{{CargoRelic
|name=Mont Sainte-Victoire
|class_id=21137
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Cézanne’s geometric deconstruction pioneered Cubism. Flaming pines and prismatic rocks shattered Renaissance perspective forever.
|fame=50
|art=107
|fth=72
|civ=78
|tech=55
|ss1=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +36<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +3<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60
|ss2=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +48<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +4<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60
|ss3=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +60<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +5<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60
|ss4=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +84<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +7<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60
|ss5=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +108<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +9<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60
|ss6=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +144<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +12<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60
|ss7=Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +144<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, SnailATK +12<br>Per 1 Mutation Hub Lv upgraded, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>Mutation Hub Upgraded: 60/60<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop DEF +120 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murkyglen skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Murky Glen:Murky Glen, Void Monolith output speed+30%
|skill2=[[File:Murkyglen skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Murky Glen:Murky Glen, Zone SUP effect reduced by 30%
|skill3=[[File:Murkyglen skill III.png|50px]]Placed in Murky Glen:Murky Glen, Relic ART +15
}}
